title: A petri dish of human brain cells is currently playing Doom. Should we be worried?
summary: Scientists in the US have uploaded a fruit fly to a computer simulation, while an Australian lab has taught neurons on a glass chip to play a 90s video game. How long before we are all living in a sci-fi movie?It sounds like the opening of a sci-fi film, but US scientists recently uploaded a copy of the brain of a living fly into a simulation. title: IEEE Partners With Academia to Create Microcredential Programs
